name: ledger-contribution
description: Turn selected human-agent work into evidence-bound contribution drafts for peer confirmation in Ledger.

interface.shortDescription: Draft reviewable contributions from selected work
interface.longDescription: Ledger Contribution turns commits, files, tests, deliverables, and summaries that a user explicitly selects into a versioned Contribution Pack. The draft can be inspected and imported into Ledger, where another authenticated team member must confirm it before the database creates an immutable Evidence Hash.
defaultPrompt: Create a Ledger Contribution Pack from this week's selected commits.
Validate this contribution pack before I import it into Ledger.
Draft evidence-bound claims for work I explicitly select.
